programme.desc: In the second of two documentaries about beating the ageing process, Angela Rippon and Dr Chris van Tulleken find out what people can do to give their brains a boost. Angela travels to Japan, where she discovers the foods that can help protect your brain, and meets the 100-year-old who is living proof of the importance of diet in keeping the grey matter healthy. In the USA, Chris finds out about a trial in which scientists are hoping to beat Alzheimer's disease by injecting sufferers with the blood of young people

programme.title: How Mad Was King George?
programme.desc: Prince Charles is among those seeking to restore George III to his proper place in history, as diaries, letters and expert analysis paint a picture of a devoted family man, whose 60-year reign culminated in his receiving accolades as 'the father of the people', while scientists explode the myths surrounding his illness

programme.title: Upstairs Downstairs
programme.desc: Drama, starring Ed Stoppard and Keeley Hawes

programme.title: The Face of Love (2013)
programme.desc: A widow begins a new relationship with a man who is the exact double of her husband, and shares many of his personality traits. Over time, she grows to love his own unique qualities, but fears he will leave her if he ever discovers the resemblance. Romantic drama, starring Annette Bening, Ed Harris and Robin Williams

programme.title: Black Gunn
programme.desc: A member of a black militant group carries out a robbery on a crime syndicate that ends in several deaths. When he is later murdered by the gangsters, his nightclub owner brother swears revenge. Crime thriller, starring Jim Brown and Martin Landau

programme.title: Strippers vs Werewolves (2012)
programme.desc: Lapdancer Justice kills a customer when he undergoes a terrifying transformation, and the body is quietly disposed of. The dead man was a werewolf, and at the next full moon, the other members of his pack plan to seek revenge. Justice and her fellow strippers have one month to prepare themselves for a battle to the death. Comedy horror, starring Adele Silva and Robert Englund

programme.title: Fox
programme.desc: Kenny prepares to fight in a championship match. Starring Ray Winstone. Originally broadcast in 1980

programme.title: Danger UXB
programme.desc: Wartime drama starring Anthony Andrews as young officer Brian Ash who joins the UXB unit during the Blitz the military organisation responsible for defusing unexploded German bombs

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring Canary Wharf and Southbank. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: The girls are booked for a concert on a ghost ship - and discover they may be cursed to stay on board forever

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: Kylie confronts her fear of flying while travelling by plane to Paris, after a scientist's secret formula turns the pilot into a pig

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Snorre, Tjure and Vic are kidnapped by Sven, but cause confusion for their captors with a little ventriloquism

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Halvar would rather go pillaging than plough the fields, even if it means the village goes without food - but Vic convinces him there is treasure to be found if he does his duty

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: Vicky paints a portrait of Celine as a gift for her birthday

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: Zara wants her pet caterpillar to perform in a special circus

programme.title: Tashi
programme.desc: Jack, Ah Chu and Tashi find a haunted house in the forest, where Little Sister is hiding a tiger cub. However, she soon finds that others are looking for her new pet

programme.title: Tashi
programme.desc: BabaYaga offers to magically turn Jack into a great singer - but the spell goes wrong and he ends up swapping voices with a pig

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: A woman's plans to house-hunt with her mother go awry and she finds herself travelling with her brother to Sarasota, Florida. The local property market is at fever pitch and a hurried search ensues for a suitable holiday home on a budget of £150,000

programme.title: Daddy Daycare
programme.desc: Three men are sent to work at a north-west London nursery, where father-of-four Grant receives a dressing down from manager Marion after losing his temper with the children. Paul is convinced childcare is easy and his partner Sally is eager for him to understand just how difficult it is, while recruitment consultant Tony's wife Marilyn hopes the experience will prompt him to spend less time working and watching sport and more time with his baby son

programme.title: How Mad Was King George?
programme.desc: Prince Charles is among those seeking to restore George III to his proper place in history, as diaries, letters and expert analysis paint a picture of a devoted family man, whose 60-year reign culminated in his receiving accolades as 'the father of the people', while scientists explode the myths surrounding his illness

programme.title: Clipper: Race of Their Lives
programme.desc: Behind the scenes on the record-breaking 40,000 nautical mile race around the world on 70-foot ocean racing yachts. Follow the inside story of what they go through to take part

programme.title: Dear Murderer (1947)
programme.desc: A man believes he has committed the perfect crime when he kills his wife's two lovers in a jealous rage. Melodrama, starring Eric Portman, Dennis Price, Jack Warner, Greta Gynt and Hazel Court

programme.title: The Rats of Tobruk (1944)
programme.desc: Two tough Australian soldiers fight alongside an intellectual Englishman in the North African campaign. They become involved in a critical siege, and their fearless efforts manage to hold up the German advance for months. Second World War drama, starring Grant Taylor, Peter Finch and Chips Rafferty

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing lesser known areas of London for locals and tourists. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Victoria Hollingsworth helps a globe-trotting pair find their dream home in Costa Rica, showing them an ocean-view condominium, a teak and cedar house, a beachfront property with a pool and a bargain-price duplex

programme.title: Danger UXB
programme.desc: Wartime drama starring Anthony Andrews as young officer Brian Ash who joins the UXB unit during the Blitz the military organisation responsible for defusing unexploded German bombs

programme.title: How Mad Was King George?
programme.desc: Prince Charles is among those seeking to restore George III to his proper place in history, as diaries, letters and expert analysis paint a picture of a devoted family man, whose 60-year reign culminated in his receiving accolades as 'the father of the people', while scientists explode the myths surrounding his illness

programme.title: Heyday TV
programme.desc: The leading members of the Kinks who were in the band from 1965 through to 1985 recall their time recording and touring

programme.title: The Moodys
programme.desc: The family faces a dilemma when Sean's court hearing clashes with Terry's local-election fundraiser, while Dan is disturbed by Cora's unusually close relationship with her visiting brother Sammy and does his best to keep them apart

programme.title: Content Content
programme.desc: Sitcom based in the offices of Content Content, a digital content agency that nobody, including the employees, can pronounce correctly

programme.title: A Random Encounter (2013)
programme.desc: Two strangers trying to make their way in Hollywood meet by chance in a coffee shop, and come away unable to stop thinking about one another. However, they both soon discover that they have no way of tracking the other down. Romantic comedy, starring Abby Wathen, Michael Rady, Meghan Markle and Sean Young

programme.title: Cruel Passion (1977)
programme.desc: A twisted tale of strange desires, perverse pleasures and the ultimate corruption of innocence as told by the Marquis de Sade

programme.title: Hooligan Escape: The Russian Job (2018)
programme.desc: Five British football fans are arrested while attending the World Cup in Russia. However, their problems get even worse when a corrupt guard hands them over to an old enemy who has been plotting revenge for years. Thriller, starring Ali Bastian and Charlie Wernham

programme.title: Go Kart Go (1964)
programme.desc: A group of children builds a go kart for a race, but a rival team plots to sabotage their efforts. Family drama, starring Dennis Waterman and Frazer Hines

programme.title: Danger UXB
programme.desc: Wartime drama starring Anthony Andrews as young officer Brian Ash who joins the UXB unit during the Blitz the military organisation responsible for defusing unexploded German bombs

programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring Forest Hill, Hither Green and Cubitt Town. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as four contestants pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Quiz show in which pairs of contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions posed to 100 people before the show. At the end of each round, the team with the most points is eliminated until the final two pairs battle for the chance to compete for a cash prize. Presented by Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman
